center.name: 西巴布亞省
center.summary: 西巴布亞省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Red-billed brushturkey、冠塚雉、Beautiful fruit dove等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The beautiful fruit dove is distributed in rainforests of New Guinea and the islands of Batanta, Waigeo, Salawati and Misool in West Papua, Indonesia, primarily in flat terrain.{{Cite journal |last=Diamond |first=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Red-billed Brushturkey inhabits to lowland forests on Vogelkop Peninsula, western Snow Mountains, and Misool Island of West Papua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is native to mountain forests of the central mountain ranges in West Papua (province), Indonesia and central Papua New Guinea (particularly the Ok Tedi River region)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in the northern Maluku Islands and west Papuan islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Waigeo brushturkey inhabits mountain forests on Waigeo Island of West Papua
